title: Corelib tiering collections & api-shape

source.subject: merge(v0.3): corelib-tiering-collections-fs-api-shape into main (keep integrated submodule tips)

body:
## What shipped

Superrepo merge commit **corelib-tiering-collections-fs-api-shape** lands tier collections, FS/Path, and api-shape work on main with integrated submodule tips.
